name: Ceres
reason: Largest main-belt body and the first asteroid discovered.

name: Pallas
reason: One of the largest main-belt asteroids and an early discovery.

name: Juno
reason: Among the first four discovered main-belt asteroids.

name: Vesta
reason: Bright, differentiated, and central to belt science and missions.

name: Hygiea
reason: One of the largest carbonaceous bodies in the belt.

name: Eunomia
reason: One of the largest stony asteroids and family-forming bodies.

name: Psyche
reason: Metal-rich asteroid and target of NASA's Psyche mission.

name: Euphrosyne
reason: Large outer-belt object with a distinct high-inclination family.

name: Europa
reason: Major C-type asteroid in the outer main belt.

name: Davida
reason: One of the most massive main-belt asteroids.

name: Interamnia
reason: Large outer-belt object that anchors the upper size distribution.
